---
title: "PurpleAir_QC"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
```
    
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# file paths to data
path_new <- "/Users/lewiswhite/CHAP_columbia/GRAPHS/exposure_analysis/weekly_data_checks/purpleair/processed_data/purpleair_latest24_2026-02-19.rds"

# Historical cleaned dataset 
path_hist <- "/Users/lewiswhite/CHAP_columbia/GRAPHS/exposure_analysis/weekly_data_checks/purpleair/processed_data/purpleair_latest24_2026-01-01.rds"


## LOAD DATA
new_raw  <- readRDS(path_new)
hist_raw <- readRDS(path_hist)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Standardize new batch
new_std <- new_raw %>%
  transmute(
    community_id     = vname,                       # align naming
    timestamp        = as.POSIXct(timestamp, tz="UTC"),
    pm2_5_atm_a_     = pm2_5_atm_a,                 # keep if present
    pm2_5_atm_b_     = pm2_5_atm_b_,                # keep if present
    perdiff          = perdiff,
    diff             = diff,
    pm2_5_atm_final  = pm2_5_atm_final,
    current_temp_f   = current_temp_f,
    current_humidity = current_humidity,
    current_dewpoint_f = current_dewpoint_f
  )

# Standardize previous batch (wont be necessary in future)
hist_std <- hist_raw %>%
  transmute(
    community_id     = vname,                       # align naming
    timestamp        = as.POSIXct(timestamp, tz="UTC"),
    pm2_5_atm_a_     = pm2_5_atm_a,                 # keep if present
    pm2_5_atm_b_     = pm2_5_atm_b_,                # keep if present
    perdiff          = perdiff,
    diff             = diff,
    pm2_5_atm_final  = pm2_5_atm_final,
    current_temp_f   = current_temp_f,
    current_humidity = current_humidity,
    current_dewpoint_f = current_dewpoint_f
  )
```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ----------------------------
# Append + de-dup
# ----------------------------
purpleair_todate <- bind_rows(hist_std, new_std) %>%
  filter(!is.na(community_id), !is.na(timestamp)) %>%
  distinct(community_id, timestamp, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Optional: save an updated “master” file so you don’t keep re-appending in the Rmd
# out_master <- "/Users/lewiswhite/CHAP_columbia/GRAPHS/exposure_analysis/weekly_data_checks/purpleair/processed_data/purpleair_master.rds"
# saveRDS(purpleair_todate, out_master)

# Quick sanity checks
range(purpleair_todate$timestamp)
table(is.na(purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_final))

###########################################################
## Sensor agreement + completeness using purpleair_todate ##
###########################################################

# ---- 1) Ensure expected columns exist ----
# Your cleaned data should already contain:
# community_id, timestamp, pm2_5_atm_a_, pm2_5_atm_b_, diff, perdiff, pm2_5_atm_final

stopifnot(all(c("community_id","timestamp") %in% names(purpleair_todate)))

# Normalize A/B sensor column names (in case RDS naming differs)
if (!"pm2_5_atm_a_" %in% names(purpleair_todate) && "pm2_5_atm_a" %in% names(purpleair_todate)) {
  purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ <- purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a
}
if (!"pm2_5_atm_b_" %in% names(purpleair_todate) && "pm2_5_atm_b" %in% names(purpleair_todate)) {
  purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_ <- purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b
}

# ---- 2) Compute diff/perdiff if missing ----
if (!"diff" %in% names(purpleair_todate) && all(c("pm2_5_atm_a_","pm2_5_atm_b_") %in% names(purpleair_todate))) {
  purpleair_todate$diff <- abs(purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ - purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_)
}
if (!"perdiff" %in% names(purpleair_todate) && all(c("pm2_5_atm_a_","pm2_5_atm_b_") %in% names(purpleair_todate))) {
  purpleair_todate$perdiff <- abs(purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ - purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_) / purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_
  purpleair_todate$perdiff <- ifelse(is.infinite(purpleair_todate$perdiff), NA, purpleair_todate$perdiff)
}

# ---- 3) Compute pm2_5_atm_final only if missing ----
# (Your cleaning script already makes this, so usually this does nothing.)
if (!"pm2_5_atm_final" %in% names(purpleair_todate) && all(c("pm2_5_atm_a_","pm2_5_atm_b_","diff","perdiff") %in% names(purpleair_todate))) {
  purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_final <- ifelse(
    purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ <= 100 & purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_ <= 100 & purpleair_todate$diff < 11,
    (purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ + purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_) / 2,
    ifelse(
      purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ > 100 & purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_ > 100 & purpleair_todate$perdiff < 0.21,
      (purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_a_ + purpleair_todate$pm2_5_atm_b_) / 2,
      NA
    )
  )
}
```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#################################################################
## Check Summary Stats of Temperature and Relative Humidity    ##
################################################################

## If temperature is above 120F or Equal to 0, set to NA
summary(purpleair_todate$current_temp_f)

purpleair_todate$tempf_updated <- ifelse(purpleair_todate$current_temp_f > 120 |purpleair_todate$current_temp_f == 0 , NA, purpleair_todate$current_temp_f )


## If relative humidity is above 98 or equal to 0 , set to NA

summary(purpleair_todate$current_humidity)

purpleair_todate$current_humidity <- ifelse(purpleair_todate$current_humidity >= 98 |purpleair_todate$current_humidity == 0 , NA, purpleair_todate$current_humidity )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}


# Plot distribution of FINAL PM by community  ----
ggboxplot(purpleair_todate, x = "community_id", y = "pm2_5_atm_final") + rotate_x_text()

```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
###########################################################
## Completeness (assumes 2-minute logging)                ##
###########################################################

purpleair_todate_post2001 <- purpleair_todate %>%
  filter(timestamp >= as.POSIXct("2001-01-01 00:00:00", tz="UTC")) %>%
  distinct(community_id, timestamp, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Fix known typos
purpleair_todate_post2001$community_id[purpleair_todate_post2001$community_id == "kadeslo"] <- "kadelso"
purpleair_todate_post2001$community_id[purpleair_todate_post2001$community_id == "suronause"] <- "suronuase"

# Split by community
purpleair_list <- split(purpleair_todate_post2001, f = purpleair_todate_post2001$community_id)

# Overall completeness
completeness <- data.frame(community = character(), completeness = numeric())

for(i in seq_along(purpleair_list)) {
  df <- purpleair_list[[i]] %>% arrange(timestamp)
  n <- nrow(df)
  expected <- as.numeric(difftime(max(df$timestamp), min(df$timestamp), units = "mins"))/2
  comp <- ifelse(expected > 0, n/expected, NA_real_)

  if (is.nan(comp) | is.infinite(comp)) comp <- NA
  if (!is.na(comp) && comp > 1) comp <- 1
  completeness <- rbind(completeness, data.frame(community = names(purpleair_list)[i], completeness = comp))
}

completeness <- completeness %>% mutate(community = fct_reorder(community, desc(completeness)))

ggplot(completeness, aes(x = community, y = completeness)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#0072B2", color = "grey30") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  rotate_x_text() +
  ylab("Data Completeness, %") +
  xlab("PurpleAir Community Monitor") +
  ggtitle("Overall completeness")

# Completeness by year
purpleair_todate_post2001$year <- year(purpleair_todate_post2001$timestamp)

completeness_yr <- data.frame(community = character(), year = integer(), completeness = numeric())

for(yr in sort(unique(purpleair_todate_post2001$year))) {
  df_yr <- purpleair_todate_post2001 %>% filter(year == yr)
  by_comm <- split(df_yr, f = df_yr$community_id)

  for(i in seq_along(by_comm)) {
    df <- by_comm[[i]] %>% arrange(timestamp)
    n <- nrow(df)
    expected <- as.numeric(difftime(max(df$timestamp), min(df$timestamp), units = "mins"))/2
    comp <- ifelse(expected > 0, n/expected, NA_real_)
    if (is.nan(comp) | is.infinite(comp)) comp <- NA
    if (!is.na(comp) && comp > 1) comp <- 1
    completeness_yr <- rbind(completeness_yr, data.frame(community = names(by_comm)[i], year = yr, completeness = comp))
  }
}

ggplot(completeness_yr, aes(x = community, y = completeness)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#0072B2", color = "grey30") +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  rotate_x_text() +
  ylab("Data Completeness, %") +
  xlab("PurpleAir Community Monitor")


# Optional: separate year plots (matches old Rmd)
plot_year <- function(target_year, base_size = 16) {
  df <- completeness_yr %>%
    filter(year == target_year) %>%
    mutate(community = fct_reorder(community, desc(completeness)))

  ggplot(df, aes(x = community, y = completeness)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#0072B2", color = "grey30") +
    theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    rotate_x_text() +
    ylab("Data Completeness, %") +
    xlab("PurpleAir Community Monitor") +
    ggtitle(paste0("Year ", target_year))
}

for (yr in sort(unique(completeness_yr$year))) {
  print(plot_year(yr))
}



# Per-community time series of pm2_5_atm_final (matches old loop)
for (i in sort(unique(purpleair_todate_post2001$community_id))) {
  df_i <- purpleair_todate_post2001 %>% filter(community_id == i)

  print(
    ggplot(df_i, aes(x = timestamp, y = pm2_5_atm_final)) +
      geom_line() +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(paste0("Community: ", i))
  )
}

```





```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
###########################################################
## A vs B agreement table + plots (uses purpleair_todate) ##
###########################################################

ab_pairs <- purpleair_todate %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(pm2_5_atm_a_), !is.na(pm2_5_atm_b_))

sensor_agreement <- ab_pairs %>%
  dplyr::group_by(community_id) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_pairs = dplyr::n(),
    corr    = cor(pm2_5_atm_a_, pm2_5_atm_b_, use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    corr = ifelse(n_pairs >= 10, corr, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    ab_pairs %>%
      dplyr::group_by(community_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        slope     = coef(lm(pm2_5_atm_b_ ~ pm2_5_atm_a_))[["pm2_5_atm_a_"]],
        intercept = coef(lm(pm2_5_atm_b_ ~ pm2_5_atm_a_))[["(Intercept)"]],
        r2        = summary(lm(pm2_5_atm_b_ ~ pm2_5_atm_a_))$r.squared,
        .groups   = "drop"
      ),
    by = "community_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    flag_low_n      = n_pairs < 10,
    flag_low_r2     = !is.na(r2) & r2 < 0.7,
    flag_slope      = !is.na(slope) & (slope < 0.8 | slope > 1.2),
    flag_intercept  = !is.na(intercept) & abs(intercept) > 15,
    any_flag        = flag_low_n | flag_low_r2 | flag_slope | flag_intercept
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(any_flag), dplyr::desc(n_pairs))

sensor_agreement



```


```{r, echo=FALSE, results="asis", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=7}
for (i in sort(unique(purpleair_todate$community_id))) {
  cat(paste0("## Community: ", i, "\n\n"))

  df_all <- purpleair_todate %>% filter(community_id == i)
  df_pair <- df_all %>% filter(!is.na(pm2_5_atm_a_), !is.na(pm2_5_atm_b_))

  # A vs B scatter with regression + correlation (paired only)
  if (nrow(df_pair) >= 10) {
    p_scatter <- ggscatter(
      df_pair, x = "pm2_5_atm_a_", y = "pm2_5_atm_b_",
      add = "reg.line", conf.int = TRUE,
      cor.coef = TRUE, cor.method = "pearson"
    ) +
      stat_regline_equation() +
      labs(x = "Sensor A PM2.5", y = "Sensor B PM2.5", title = paste0("Community: ", i))

    print(p_scatter)
  } else {
    cat("*Not enough paired A/B observations to plot regression (n < 10).* \n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # Overlaid time series A vs B (keep all rows; gaps are ok)
  p_ts_ab <- ggplot(df_all, aes(x = timestamp)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pm2_5_atm_a_, color = "A"), alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pm2_5_atm_b_, color = "B"), alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(color = "Sensor",
       title = paste0("PM2.5 sensors over time: ", i),
       x = "Date", y = "PM2.5")
  print(p_ts_ab)
  cat("\n\n")

  p_temp <- ggplot(df_all, aes(x = timestamp, y = tempf_updated)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste0("Temperature (F): ", i), x = "Date", y = "Temp (F)")
  print(p_temp)
  cat("\n\n")

  p_rh <- ggplot(df_all, aes(x = timestamp, y = current_humidity)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste0("Relative Humidity (%): ", i), x = "Date", y = "RH (%)")
  print(p_rh)
  cat("\n\n***\n\n")
}
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Final export dataset (mirrors old Rmd)
purpleair_todate_post2001$temp_C <- (purpleair_todate_post2001$tempf_updated - 32) * (5/9)

purpleair_final <- purpleair_todate_post2001 %>%
  select(community_id, timestamp, pm2_5_atm_final, temp_C, current_humidity) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(community_id, timestamp, pm2_5_atm_final))

# Rename columns to match legacy export
names(purpleair_final)[names(purpleair_final) == "community_id"] <- "nodeId"
names(purpleair_final)[names(purpleair_final) == "pm2_5_atm_final"] <- "pm2_5_atm"
names(purpleair_final)[names(purpleair_final) == "temp_C"] <- "current_temp_f" #rename here convert below

# Convert temp back to F for output (as old Rmd did)
purpleair_final$current_temp_f <- (purpleair_final$current_temp_f * (9/5)) + 32

# Write CSV (choose path)
out_dir <- "/Users/lewiswhite/CHAP_columbia/GRAPHS/exposure_analysis/weekly_data_checks/purpleair/clean_PA_summaries/"
out_csv <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("purpleair_final_", Sys.Date(), ".csv"))
out_rds <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("purpleair_final_", Sys.Date(), ".rds"))

write_csv(purpleair_final, out_csv)
saveRDS(purpleair_final, out_rds)

```
